actors.name: RegisteredUser
actors.description: Extracted actor from user story template: "As a RegisteredUser, I want to apply a coupon code to my Cart, so that I can see the discounted total."

businessRules.description: 1. The RegisteredUser must enter a valid coupon code in the voucher field.
businessRules.expectedOutcome: 1. The RegisteredUser must enter a valid coupon code in the voucher field.

businessRules.description: 2. If the coupon is active, the system should apply the discount percentage immediately.
businessRules.condition: 2. If the coupon is active, the system

businessRules.description: 3. Only one coupon can be applied per checkout transaction.
businessRules.expectedOutcome: 3. Only one coupon can be applied per checkout transaction.

businessRules.description: 4. The system must recalculate the total cart price and display the discounted price fast.
businessRules.expectedOutcome: 4. The system must recalculate the total cart price and display the discounted price fast.

ambiguities.description: Conditional statement lacks alternative branch (e.g. "else" or "failure path").
ambiguities.locationSnippet: 2. If the coupon is active, the system should apply the discount percentage immediately.

ambiguities.description: Vague term "fast" detected. Define target execution time in ms (e.g., < 200ms).
ambiguities.locationSnippet: 4. The system must recalculate the total cart price and display the discounted price fast.

ambiguities.description: Passive voice indicates actions without declaring the triggering actor or system.
ambiguities.locationSnippet: The user is redirected to the checkout page after coupon application.
